title: Widdop Moments Stoneware Ceramic Mug - Mum Like You Mug - White Colour - Coffee Tea Hot Drinks - Approx 350ml - Gift for Mum Birthday Mother's Day
features: Celebrate Mum: Show your appreciation with the charming "A Lucky Few Have a Mum Like You" mug.
Stylish Design: Crafted from high-quality stoneware in a chic fawn color with a glossy glaze.
Generous Capacity: Holds approximately 350ml of Mum's favorite beverage, perfect for morning coffee or afternoon tea.
Meaningful Gift: Ideal for birthdays, Mother's Day, or any occasion to show Mum how much she means to you.
Treasured Keepsake: This mug serves as a heartfelt reminder of the everlasting friendship between you and Mum.
description: Introducing the Moments Mug by Widdop - ‘Mum like you,’ a heartfelt addition that beautifully captures the essence of the love children have for their mother. Made from sturdy stoneware, this mug features a lovely, glazed finish in a fawn colour, adding both style and substance to the drinking experience. Ideal as thoughtful gift for a special mum, this item invites the receiver to savour the moments and cherish the joys of motherhood.
